speaker: MATT
raw_text: No. As the portal shifts closed behind you, you all step out into the center of the Whitestone city square. You can see behind you the Sun Tree where you guys left originally. It is midday. Clouds are high in the sky. Little breaks where you can see beams of sunlight coming through. Looks like there's a darker rainstorm coming, probably in the next half-day or so, off in the distant northwest, and there are now townspeople looking about at the group of you guys. Keyleth, Scanlan, Vex, and Vax: returning, your mind feels a little fuzzy, but overall nothing seems to have affected you. You're glad to be back. Percy and Grog, you are very confused how you got here and not quite sure why nothing has happened since you gathered here as friends. Yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's right. That's right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You then gathered hands and through the magical capabilities of Keyleth, the druid of the Air Ashari, you managed to Plane Shift the rest of the party back to Whitestone itself. Speaking of which--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Already? Already?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long have we been gone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, and I also need Scanlan, Percy, and Grog to roll wisdom saving throws.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What did we do to deserve that?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We all deserve it. We know we do. That was terrible. I have a thing called Resolve and I have one usage of it left. May I use it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get to reroll a saving throw? Yeah, you may.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Would this be magic, Matt?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's double.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Goddamn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a magical effect.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're in trouble.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If it's not magic, then I have an 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Guys, drama needs conflict.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hot damn!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm so excited.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Scanlan, how do you modify his memory? Because at this level you can alter the memories of an event that took up to seven days ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We were in Syngorn.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, I think I can help. I'm going to cast Modify Memory on Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And Grog's just content sitting over here completely blank.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Eating chicken that he found on the road.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is so exciting.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Little gamey?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've never seen him laugh like that before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is-- this is a way to do it. All right. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can help you remember, Percy. Just look into my eyes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to.

preceding_turns.text: Look into my eyes. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's getting giffed. Okay, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But wait, are you just going to make up what he remembers? No!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy, I need you to make a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and I'm out of Resolve.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What is your spell DC? Is this with the cone? Scanlan, is this with the cone?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: With the cone. I want this to work.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're going to pull-- screaming in his face.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been close to a week in the Feywild total, all the nights you've rested.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Inception.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lady Vex'ahlia. Baroness of the Third House of Whitestone and the Grand Mistress of the Grey Hunt.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus Christ. Baroness of what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of the Third House of Whitestone.

preceding_turns.text: And Grand Mistress of the Grey Hunt.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whitestone and Grand Mistress of the Grey Hunt.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of all the ten minutes to have him remember, maybe that's not the one to focus on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's not remembering. He's going to be making it up. I'm not actually going to remember it, he's going to lie.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Make up something wonderful for him. He's wanted to go there his entire life. Make something magical.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You don't have time to have this conversation. This is happening right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Jarett is coming down and he sees. "Aye, friends, it has been a while. I'm so happy to see that you survived. It's been a while. Is everyone okay?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We know it. It's good doggie.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we know the word already?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's part of the enchantment, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good doggie.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you teach us how to say that in Elvish?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Don't teach him how to say it in Elvish.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can say it in Common. He understands Common.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He understands Common, that's fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vel'ena. Vo'el'ena.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Vo'el'el'ena?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Vo'el'la'la'la.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right, we start walking back to Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Grog, I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's get the dog out here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's hold off on the dog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys make your way towards the castle, there's a small group of figures. You see three armored Whitestone soldiers with one figure following them. Different outfit, looks to be simple dark blues and grays. Dark skin, short dark hair, carrying his crossbow at his side. As you make eyes, you immediately recognize this as Jarett.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Jarett!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I did not inquire as to the location, but they said they should be back in the next few days."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: How long?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Aye, most better part of a week."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it is like Saturday here, right? Time runs the same?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it wasn't yesterday?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why did you taste the wind?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know why. It's a strange question." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It tastes like Saturday, certainly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "More confused by the question, but it's fine. All right."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How are things here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, (sighs) let's just say better for the time being." And as you look up, what you didn't notice before when you saw the clouds is there's this slight light blue hue to the entire sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's this very faint shimmer to it. And he goes, "Ah, the barrier is now up, which is good. As soon as they finished that, Allura, Drake and Kima all left to find information on the green dragon."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It's three days ago? They were hoping to get insight on Thordak's current situation while we amass as many armored folks here as possible and continue to reach out for allies. I think that is the main goal right now, is to find as many allies as we can. It was interesting to put a stake into this fight."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it wasn't yesterday?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why did you taste the wind?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know why. It's a strange question." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It tastes like Saturday, certainly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "More confused by the question, but it's fine. All right."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How are things here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, (sighs) let's just say better for the time being." And as you look up, what you didn't notice before when you saw the clouds is there's this slight light blue hue to the entire sky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's this very faint shimmer to it. And he goes, "Ah, the barrier is now up, which is good. As soon as they finished that, Allura, Drake and Kima all left to find information on the green dragon."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Where?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I did not inquire as to the location, but they said they should be back in the next few days."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cassandra might know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She will.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: When did they leave?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Thank you, I'm glad somebody does. Asum actually just arrived here. About two or three hours ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back. Slight little technical issue there. We're going to roll back in. Little bit of information, step into the moment. As Jarett has walked down the steps of Whitestone and began a conversation with Vox Machina about the current situation here, he says how, "Currently, Allura, Kima, and Drake are off trying to find information on the green dragon, Raishan, and trying to discover what best can be done regarding the attack on Thordak in Emon. Here, I am doing the best I can to build what armed forces we have at our disposal, and we're trying to reach out to bring whatever allies are willing to put their stakes into this battle. But yes, this is a monumental task based on my own experience, and I'm doing the best I can. But bear with me, it's--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We have faith in you, Jarett.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Anyway, have a seat. Asum, please, inform them of what you've been telling us." As you all find a seat, he sits there quietly, his eyes darting around in his head, ruminating over the thoughts and trying to formulate his presentation. He crosses his fingers in front of his face. "Things are a bit of a mess within the city. None are allowed to leave. Living under the watch of the wyvern guard, hundreds of lizardmen worshipers of Thordak have been watching the city from above. Some have tried to flee beyond the walls, but ultimately end up being returned at the end of a set of talons and not seen again. Thordak calls a gathering every dusk of the surviving populace. Tens of thousands forced to come and gather at the center of the remnants of the Cloudtop District. He gloats, instills fear in all that behold this, and offers forgiveness to those who offer fealty to him. All are to cheer his name, applaud his statements, and thank him for his mercy. Those that fail to do so are pulled from the crowd by his lizardmen and devoured by the beast himself, lined up to the slaughter as a show. And there is laughter from the beast that pushed them into his maw. Most of the wealth of the city is now amassed in the ashes of the district, forming a massive wall of shiny chunk and coin, like a nest around the fucking beast. He's enslaved a number of the greatest sculptors of the city to begin making his likeness in the surrounding stone. They chisel away at the tall, proud walls of the interior, showing his terrible face where it does not belong. A vain fucker. He's crazy, that one. What's more dangerous than an intelligent dragon than one who's crazy? I've been keeping an eye as best as I can. Thordak gives direct orders to his wyvern guard often, some off to communicate, I presume, with the other members of the Conclave; I know not. I've been stuck within the city. Most survivors stay indoors. I've been working with the Clasp, believe it or not, to shepherd over a thousand people below the city streets for protection. The lesser of two evils, to be sure, but at the very least, at the moment they have nothing to gain by working against us at this juncture. Naught but six hours ago, the Cinder King was roaring in anger, his cries echoing through the streets. The people fell to their knees, thinking this was the end. Stepped up from his volcanic throne, and sent the majority of his army eastward. I used this distraction to slip into the now-unguarded Lyceum, find a port scroll and a sigil for Whitestone before they returned. Came here to see all of you alive, so that's the best news I've had in weeks. That's the best I have to bring you about the current state of the city."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Another Vestige.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you pull it out, they all step back. Gilmore leans forward. "Very good."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I would love for you to take a look at it, Shaun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I would love to have a look at it." He takes it. As you hand it to him, it actually curls around the back of his hands and whips back into a strong, tensile stance, and he-- "That's weird." He takes it and starts looking over it as Cassandra looks back. "I'm glad you're all safe, and apparently named. Welcome to Whitestone, Lady Vex'ahlia."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She takes it, folds it. "I'll have this put in the books immediately."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I appreciate your kind generosity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I will request more information soon."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll see, yes. That might be complicated, but yes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. You start creating all these various things, and people start ushering in. It's getting to the point now where there's so many people. You hear crying children, families pressed in, you're feeling claustrophobic and the room's getting hotter and hotter the more bodies that are in there. You keep concentrating and pushing the earth out. You can feel the sweat beads pouring down your face, concentrating, concentrating. You hear the crying and sobbing, and people trying to comfort those that are freaking out. Every now and then you hear a distant echoing cry, a scream of a dragon in the distance, and everyone in the room tenses, and the sobbing gets even louder, then hushed again with whispering silence. You keep pushing and keep pushing, opening. You guys all begin to gather the rest as you watch, with that final cry, the dragon and the wyverns pick up (whoosh) and swoop towards the center of the valley, arcing to the west, and do a wide sweep of the mountain range. (flapping wings)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fallout cavern style. Big, lower, bigger, lower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get about three platforms down before the earth stops responding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do you mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fucking ziggurat!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The fucking ziggurat!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Other way, other way!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I go the other way!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't empty out the earth too much, or it won't support the city.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fallout style. Little pods.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Gilmore has been bringing people en masse down to the castle. You haven't seen him for a number of-- probably 15, 20 minutes or so. The dragons coast around, and begin to disappear in the southeastern distance where they came from. You do, at this point, catch Gilmore, who has moved to the top of the castle and is currently, arms out, concentrating, pouring all the energy he can into that barrier.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Where's Gilmore?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, you have overlapping memories. So she reaches up and you bend down. She takes your glasses off. Hands them to Vex. Reaches up and touches the sides of your temple. "Now, concentrate." Close your eyes, and there's a burst of warmth towards the front of your lobe, almost like someone's dipping your head into hot water. And with that, there's a smattering of memories that are rushing into your mind. It takes you a moment. Your head swims, and you have to almost sit down. You almost stumble off your back foot as your brain now has to reorganize those lost moments. Seven days now immediately restored.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (surprised noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry! I'm sorry, you didn't get to kill anything. I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, he did! He still killed the big bad guy!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you did! You did, you killed the one thing. Okay, good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I got petrified!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, well, stoned.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I tried diplomacy! Never again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Lesson learned.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can you only do that one time a day?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, I can do it once more."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe... well...

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, it's okay, yeah! Percy will remember the nude massage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She walks up to Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Think of what he's losing, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not losing it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Potentially.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, because it doesn't matter. It's there anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Actually, I don't know. I don't know.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: They are gone. The time has passed. They're miles and miles and miles and miles and miles at the speed they were travelling. You're a good shot, but I don't know if you could arc an arrow that far.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What more do you need?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I fly up in the air while this conversation's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't go too high.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not too high.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We don't know where the thing is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, I know, I want to go to the very top where I see the shimmer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah and it's a squat shimmer, not a full dome and it's like a very extended type dome.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. But it's high enough, that I mean it's higher than the castle.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's high enough where you can get about 80 feet up and you start to see enough detail in the shimmer where you're like, "Okay, I'm getting close."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The direction that the dragons went. Is this stupid? Can I shoot my Oracle Arrow in that direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No. Absolutely not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (high-pitched) Why would you bring attention to us?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's an arrow!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They're long gone.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Correct. Or see through it as it's fired, the minute it leaves the bow you can project your sight through the arrow for up to 10 minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. The direction that the dragons went. Is this stupid? Can I shoot my Oracle Arrow in that direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No. Absolutely not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (high-pitched) Why would you bring attention to us?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's an arrow!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They're long gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They are gone. The time has passed. They're miles and miles and miles and miles and miles at the speed they were travelling. You're a good shot, but I don't know if you could arc an arrow that far.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh well, I guess that's true. I thought it was a ten-minute, because it's Fenthras I thought it was a long-ass arrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can't you tell what direction the dragons were heading?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Wait, okay, so the Oracle Arrow, is it like you fire it, and then it shoots somewhere and it sticks there and I can see through it for ten minutes?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Gilmore chuckles to himself, "Ank'Harel. It's been awhile." And looks at--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We saw Thordak there, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh! Even more of a reason not to go!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's here now, so Fire Plane's probably safer!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's got a very fair point.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why do you ask, Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, look, the Plate of the Dawnmartyr is in a City of Brass, but I don't know where that is.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I bet that sounds something Pike would like.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Draconia is in Wildemount?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Draconia is in Wildemount, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right. And so is the big white fuck, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Are any of the Vestiges in Wildemount?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The City of Brass?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Whereabouts are the Vestiges?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: One at the bottom of the sea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: One is in Marquet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The City of Brass is in the Plane of Fire. We've covered that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's not in Draconia? It's in the Plane of Fire?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The city is in the Plane of Fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Correct. Where's Ank'Harel?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ank'Harel is on the continent of-- what's it's called?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Travel by boat, across the Ozmit, maybe about a week, a week and a half. Skyship, maybe half as long."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's probably a bad sign, but thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We'll do that immediately. It sounds like a grand plan." Asum says, "Not a worry. We'll do that immediately."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll just have to Seeker Asum that it happened? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We should move quickly. We should pick a couple of Vestiges and move quickly, collect them. Start finding more allies, move quickly. But we should not dally too long.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I agree, we might not be able to wait to get them all before we start taking on dragons. We might want to do both.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jarett says, "If you're looking to go to the Ozmit Sea, you'll probably need a ship of some kind. It's quite a far travel and that distance as well and the docks on the west coast right now are, well they're locked down at Emon."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Could Cabal's Ruin--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How long is the travel to Marquet?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, my usual travel to Wildemount is across the northern channel here. I'd say you're looking at about two weeks of travel by ship across the Lucidian Ocean."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We got lucky.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I like Grog's idea. Is there a way to explore that any further?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pitting the dragons against each other?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think it's a great idea worth exploring.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Seeker Asum is on it. He said that he was going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seeker Asum is great, but we're the best in the business. I wouldn't leave our plan A to someone not us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Seeker Asum is telling people that this city has been magicked away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Asum is also still at the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're drunk, we will talk about you in third person as much as we want.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're just reiterating the things that you told us you were going to say.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's all right."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We figured you would speak up if you had issue.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Plus it's really fun to say your name.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Never heard it before, I assure you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How far away is Draconia from here? Travel wise?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Two weeks via ship. Ocean ship.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So we could do a triple.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We could do a triple. Because I have to get to the Water Ashari at some point.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that's very important, because we need them on our side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Between what and what?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ozmit Sea, so it's over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's between what and who?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The Ozmit Sea is between Marquet and Tal'Dorei.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this Tal'Dorei?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're on Tal'Dorei.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So Marquet is Japan.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: More Australia.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Got it. Is this world round? Can we go the other way?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Actually, this world is shaped like a d20, so we're on the flat part at the five.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can't go the other way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You could eventually get there. It is round.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Would I know how fast dragons can actually fly? If it's a two-week trip to get to Draconia from where we are--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few days.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Get people out, do recon, whatever.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Plant some seeds.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They've probably left a good amount of army there to keep people under control. We'd have to get in and out in a couple of hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And what would our mission be?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Dump a couple of statues.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We don't have them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let other people do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait. What about, instead of dumping statues, we find these orbs? We find his lair, we find his orbs, and we call Thordak and we do a voice like: Yo, Thordak! You're a dickhead! I'm going to come kill you! Or we just smash them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know why everyone's so excited about the notion of pissing off the dragons to the point at which they all come here, but it is a way to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They don't know we're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They know we're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm just pointing out an opportunity where there is one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's true.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At this point in time, it's mid-afternoon, evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And what would our mission be?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Dump a couple of statues.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We don't have them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let other people do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait. What about, instead of dumping statues, we find these orbs? We find his lair, we find his orbs, and we call Thordak and we do a voice like: Yo, Thordak! You're a dickhead! I'm going to come kill you! Or we just smash them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know why everyone's so excited about the notion of pissing off the dragons to the point at which they all come here, but it is a way to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They don't know we're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They know we're here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm just pointing out an opportunity where there is one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A few days.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It would take them a few days to get there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A few days? We would have a whole fucking day!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So. As you guys come to consciousness the next morning, the storm has come in now--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wish you guys could see it up close. Obviously, we're going to send a picture on Twitter so you guys can see it, but it lights up different colors!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Design based on David Rodriguez's concept art for Fenthras.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's got Elvish for "protector" and "growth."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's so badass.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did I say it right? Protector, not protection? Protector is right!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Protector and growth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Say what?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you so much!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Kiki!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're unbelievable.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Should we put it down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. There we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lean it up against the table.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You did see, distant, blurred from your perspective, since the focus of the scry was on Lockheed, you did see movement and very small distant objects within the snow at the base of the ravine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Not a good option.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys have fallen 50 feet and been fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Someone has Feather Fall, right? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did it look like a natural cavern or a man-made cavern that Lockheed was in?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From what you can tell, it looks natural.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like he found a little cave and is hiding?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's less of a cave and more he's perched on this little alcove, this little outcropping of rock on the side of the ravine wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's on the side of the ravine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: On the side of the ravine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I have an idea. What if we tie a rope on something on this side and we all go out of the rope really fast and drop down?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Grog first.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should you scry one more time, for the dad? Because best-case scenario, we're in a weird, snowy ravine with no civilization around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We don't want to be around any civilization. And also, that's one more spell gone.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You don't feel the pain. And the wings do cause a significant barrier of impact, as well as the snow. As soon as you land, you go into a classic shoulder roll and use the inertia to not arise above the water. You both essentially coast sideways, stopping within the snowbank. From an overhead perspective, you can see a large swath has been carved through. But from visual eye range, at equal level, you guys still appear to be hidden within the snow. The two of you jump through and start rappelling down, Grog at the bottom end. Bringing the rope, bringing the rope down, bringing the rope down. It slams shuts, the rope cuts at the other end as the portal closes. Percy, you just make it out as the rope gives way. It is now Grog and Percy plummeting toward the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fly through, and then once I see them hit the ground, I'm going to dive-bomb us, and I'm going to wrap us in a little wing bubble and roll into the snow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you guys come falling out the side of the tree, you see nearby as a small, green tiny dragon gets startled and flies off. You guys go coasting, the wings expand for a second. It picks up and as you hit, whipping past the 15 feet of jagged rocks that were gathered at the base of the ravine, you scoot over it, the wings fold in around you, and you guys tumble into the snow. Make an acrobatics check with disadvantage because you're grabbing onto her and are covered in wings.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And you're covered in wings.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a 15 and a 20. That would be a 30.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It has been gone for days."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I would be lying if I said it did not bring a chance for freedom to all of us Ravenites."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Much deserved.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But as time progresses, I fear we shake one bond to step into another. The dragon presented itself as our savior, but has since required an ever-growing fealty."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Without the Draconians, without the Sky-walkers, and without the Doom, we would be free. Rebuild our culture."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want nothing more for you than that. Let us help you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Now, the rest of you hear this  "Do your friends speak Common?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's lovely.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hi!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hi, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Much relieved. Yes, they do.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Grog doesn't, but we do.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (moans) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If we are to let you go, do you promise to slay this creature?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We will do everything in our power to watch it die.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It is our only purpose.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: At which point, she steps off of the throne, steps on both of her feet, and when she's off the throne, her imposing form becomes far less imposing. You can see now there's a very heavy hunch to her back, and as she scuffles forward, she's an almost pitiful-looking sight, physically. As she pulls forward to walk straight to you, Keyleth, you see the somewhat clouded, cataract-ridden eyes of the dragonborn female Tooma. She comes up to you and goes, "We are a proud people, even when pressed into the dirt for as many years as we have been. We reclaim our honor. We reclaim our place in this world. We wish to do this as peacefully as possible, but we have been forced to scrounge and survive through this freedom. We wish you no folly. We wish you no ill will. But we also have learned that trust needs to be earned; it cannot be spoken and given so freely. Both ways. You are right to mistrust, as are we of you. But that is the impasse. One must have faith, in one way or another, if there is to be a compromise."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You speak with accents I do not understand. Where do you come from?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're a motley crew.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lots of different places.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do not answer that question.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can answer the continent.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As you can see, we're half-elves.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We are to walk to the den. We are to learn your information. Then what?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Set up a situation where we can monitor you and possibly contact you when it's time, and even let you know if we think the dragon's about to leave, so that you can prepare.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have lived to see this day by not being deceived or tricked. You speak words that are not direct. They wind. They spin. They circle. What guarantee do I have that you will not just flee?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: To be fair, what guarantee do we have that you won't kill us, and the ambush was meant for us? I believe there is untrust on both sides.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Pushing on, it's gotten a little lighter in the sky. You figure, based on your arrival, you may have just come in at the cusp of dawn, and the sun has now gotten higher in the sky. You're on the entire opposite side of the planet now, so the cycle has changed based on the location you're currently in. Well, you had rested, actually. You left in the morning. You would've gotten here-- actually, opposite of that. It's actually now getting to dusk. Even though it's only been a couple of hours of daylight that you've seen since you woke up this morning, it's already beginning to set, and the sky is getting darker.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I tell Tooma, as we walk out  P.S., if that dragon comes back, we need to bolt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She nods. "If that dragon comes back, we never saw you, you never saw us."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's very slow, by the way. Your passage of travel is about half speed as she leads the charge, but everyone respectfully keeps in pace with her.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tooma, have you ever heard of a dragonborn named Gern Blanston?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She thinks for a second. "That name has not come to my mind, no."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Us neither.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can keep watch as you go. You push towards the center of the ravine, and upon the large island of rubble, you begin to move, and it takes a good 40, 50 minutes, an hour, to traverse, a lot further than you would've expected in that time period. Sorry, a lot less than you figured you would traverse in that time, being weighed down by Tooma's gait. However, the rubble begins to subside, and you begin to see steps of ice. Not perfect, carved steps, but elements of encapsulated broken platforms of ice that act as stairs. Vax, Vex, and Keyleth, as you guys begin to move up the steps, and you especially, Vex, you can see, with what little bit of light is beginning to shine down through the ice, you can see mounds and mounds of coins and jewel boxes and many expensive knick-knacks and collections, all below feet of solid ice, all clustered towards the apex of this collapsed, ruined island.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Note every tree as we walk by.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm paying attention to the trees. That's the biggest tree that's now closest to us. Now that's the biggest tree that's now closest to us. Now that one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're led down into the ravine, you reach this central structure, and you can already see from this distance, as the snow falls, hitting and covering the rocks, there are dozens and dozens of those spikes of ice jutting out of the rock, each with one or two various frozen corpses impaled on them and left. At the top of this, you can see a large cluster of ice that is in a somewhat round gathering, and you can see-- actually, no, you don't see that. Sorry. A note that will come into play in the future.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I ask a question? The bodies on the spikes. None of them look familiar, right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you guys begin to approach, you can see now the ice that encases the golden coins begins to ripple upward, and it's getting harder and harder to climb. You can see now, it comes to an apex in this bowl-like formation, and as you get to a point where it's harder to ascend, you can see Tooma stops and sees that she can't go much further, and she points up and goes, "That is where it sleeps. That is where we come to give what we find. And that is where it should fall."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tooma, is Vorugal having you collect all of this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Vorugal sends us to pay the debt we owe for being freed, yes. We scavenge. We spend our days searching for food, for the means to survive, and finding what we can from the ruins of the broken Draconia."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And when you can't find anything? What then?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "These are the thoughts that consume me. It is the reason you are still alive." Everyone make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, dog! 14!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't the golden snitch?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I put the golden snitch away for the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I got a natural 20 when I dropped it. Giving up on it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You spend the next 15 minutes or so, 20 minutes, skirting around the outside of this large frozen bowl, looking for some semblance of a set trap. You don't recognize anything as any sort of mechanism placed that would set off your warning defense systems as a rogue.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 29. Looking for any traps.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "How about this. I trust you to return. Let's set a time, so we know where the limits are. Eight days."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: When we come back, we stay until it's time. When we come back, it is to end this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: For now, we leave a back-door entrance.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With the trees, we will know how to return quickly with a force.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This might be something we go to the Slayer's Take for. They always have a roster of big beasts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With a little bit of information, we could even keep them informed of things for it to kill that they may find around here, with the Slayer's Take's help. We can keep you in supply of things to amuse it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I trust you know what you say. These words mean nothing to me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are sorry that this cannot end as quickly as would be agreeable. We can do our best to help make you comfortable, and if you need some proof of the power that we wield, we can offer a token. I have a thought. But if you wish, a token of our power.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Two weeks?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With a little bit of information, we could even keep them informed of things for it to kill that they may find around here, with the Slayer's Take's help. We can keep you in supply of things to amuse it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I trust you know what you say. These words mean nothing to me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are sorry that this cannot end as quickly as would be agreeable. We can do our best to help make you comfortable, and if you need some proof of the power that we wield, we can offer a token. I have a thought. But if you wish, a token of our power.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How about this. I trust you to return. Let's set a time, so we know where the limits are. Eight days."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wow. That's soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can send a beast before, perhaps, but our travel is long. We may need more time. We have two more continents.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How much time do you need?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Two weeks.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Two weeks. 14 sun cycles past. If we do not hear from you, the Frigid Doom is known to this Whitestone you speak."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I trust you know what you say. These words mean nothing to me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We are sorry that this cannot end as quickly as would be agreeable. We can do our best to help make you comfortable, and if you need some proof of the power that we wield, we can offer a token. I have a thought. But if you wish, a token of our power.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How about this. I trust you to return. Let's set a time, so we know where the limits are. Eight days."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wow. That's soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can send a beast before, perhaps, but our travel is long. We may need more time. We have two more continents.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How much time do you need?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Two weeks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Two weeks?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Continents. Further than you have walked in your life. We move quickly, but there is only so much that can be done.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You watch as she leans in, and she shakes her head for a minute and goes, "What was your question? I do not know these words you speak."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you can get away from the city--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can possibly do it subterranean.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There is solid ground here. Up there, above the ravine, wherever else you need it to be."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Where does the dragon not tread? Where do you know he will not see the trees?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Probably out of the ravine. He stalks inside quite extensively."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's find a place. This will be where we leave, anyway.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tooma. I have one more question about Gern Blanston. I raise the hand cone, and I cast Modify Memory on her.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh no. Oh jeez. Oh man, I love it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Look at Matt's face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're about to get attacked.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, we're about to run.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I roll my initiative in advance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There we go. All right, what's the DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What are you trying to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm trying to change the moment that I said "Whitestone" into "Emon."

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Whether or not you are taking the time to sleep or ruminate on the events, as it's only been half a day since last you woke up, you take some time with Lockheed. He eats a little more food and leaps to the window of your room, and then takes off over the rest of Whitestone. You process this time, this moment, this memory, and realize how much has been lost through this journey, but yet how much is worth saving. How much is worth fighting for. And then, as much as you bunch of fuck-up misfits that came together as friends years ago have come to a point of understanding your true worth and what the importance is of really standing up for the things that you believe in in this world, and the people that need protecting, and know that the next step of your journey should come soon. Whether you stand or fall, this is the fight that needs to be fought. And with luck be at your side, that terrible fucking dragon will meet its end soon enough. And with that we'll pick up next week on Thursday.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I give the Sun Tree a little pat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The morning sun begins to rise.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll report what we've seen. We'll try to gain our bearings again, get sleep tonight. We'll report what we've seen in the new room. No one else. And we will never utter this city's name outside these walls again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Totally. Dick move.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You find yourselves to rest, keeping memories fresh untill sleep takes you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Knock on Vax's door.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As everyone else is going to rest, Keyleth, you find your way to Vax's door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I stay with you tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't fuck anything up with words, and I open the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm not going to fuck it up by saying anything. I open the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I just go in.
